questions.question:
In _____________ machine is executing operating system instruction \( : \)



Operating System: NIELIT 2021 Dec Scientist B

Which of the following is true?



Operating System: NIELIT 2021 Dec Scientist B
options: Unless enabled, a \( \text{CPU} \) will not be able to process interrupts
Loop instructions cannot be interrupted till they complete
A processor need not checks for interrupts before executing a new instruction
Only level triggered interrupts are possible on microprocessors
questions.correct_answer: Unless enabled, a \( \text{CPU} \) will not be able to process interrupts
